overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, starting in a futuristic urban commercial district with industrial elements, passing through a commercial strip with palm trees and a large ferris wheel landmark, then transitioning onto desert highways and winding mountain roads. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with warm afternoon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban industrial corridor with noise barriers

agents.ego_description: driving forward through an industrial urban corridor with concrete barriers on the right and warehouse buildings on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving parallel in the left lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with red trim running parallel to the road on the right side
low-rise industrial warehouses and commercial structures with weathered facades
tall modern glass and steel tower visible in the distant skyline
elevated highway overpass crossing perpendicular to the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through an industrial urban corridor. Concrete noise barriers line the right side while industrial warehouses occupy the left. A futuristic skyscraper looms in the distant skyline, and the vehicle maintains a steady speed alongside sparse traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial strip with palm trees and digital signage

events.description: vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection, navigating around the corner

agents.ego_description: navigating through a commercial district, making a right turn at an intersection while passing palm trees and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on the sidewalk near the commercial buildings

entered.detail: single-story commercial buildings with green awnings and storefront facades
tall palm trees lining the street, indicating a warmer climate zone
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on the right side of the road
massive intricate metal ferris wheel structure with a complex lattice design, serving as a landmark

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a commercial district characterized by palm trees and storefronts with green awnings. After making a right turn at an intersection, a massive ferris wheel structure becomes visible in the distance as a prominent landmark. Digital billboards and scattered pedestrians line the streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone with amusement landmark and desert outskirts

events.description: environment transitions from dense commercial buildings to open desert outskirts with rocky formations

agents.ego_description: driving past the ferris wheel landmark and transitioning from urban commercial area into desert outskirts

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rocky outcrops and desert terrain becoming visible on the horizon
wooden utility poles with power lines running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes close to the massive ferris wheel structure, revealing its intricate metal framework. The environment transitions from urban commercial to desert outskirts, with rocky formations appearing in the background. Palm trees and commercial buildings give way to open roads and utility poles.

events.description: vehicle approaches and stops at a traffic light at a desert intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising along a desert highway, approaching an intersection and stopping at a red traffic light

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock formations
standard traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a desert highway flanked by rocky cliffs and sparse vegetation. The urban landscape has completely given way to arid terrain. The vehicle approaches an intersection with traffic lights and stops, with other vehicles visible ahead on the open road.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with construction site

events.description: vehicle navigates a series of curves and bends in the mountain road

agents.ego_description: steering through winding mountain roads, passing a large unfinished construction building and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: large multi-story building under construction with exposed concrete framework and scaffolding
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
metal guardrail running along the right edge of the winding road

segments.scene_description: The road becomes winding and narrow as it cuts through rocky terrain. A large unfinished construction building dominates the view ahead, while graffiti-covered retaining walls line the right side. The vehicle navigates curves with guardrails now present along the roadside.

agents.ego_description: cruising along a straight desert highway with guardrails, surrounded by open arid landscape and distant mountains

entered.detail: hazy mountain range visible on the horizon against the sky
high voltage power transmission towers and lines running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows open highway driving through arid desert terrain. Guardrails line the right side of the road while power lines run parallel on the right. The landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains on the horizon, with the road stretching straight ahead through the sparse desert environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a dense industrial urban corridor into a sprawling desert landscape. It begins by moving past concrete noise barriers and industrial warehouses toward a distant skyscraper on the skyline. As the vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection, the scene shifts into a commercial district filled with palm trees, green storefront awnings, and glowing digital billboards. The camera then glides past the intricate metal framework of a massive ferris wheel, which serves as the final urban landmark before the environment opens up. Finally, the commercial buildings and city streets give way to open roads and utility poles as rocky desert formations emerge in the background.

The shot follows a continuous drive through an arid wasteland that shifts from open desert highways to narrow mountain passes before returning to a vast horizon. It begins along a desert highway flanked by rocky cliffs and sparse vegetation, eventually slowing to a stop at a traffic intersection amidst other vehicles. As the vehicle moves forward, the road becomes winding and narrow, cutting through rocky terrain past graffiti-covered retaining walls and a looming unfinished construction building. The scene then opens back up into a straight stretch of highway lined with guardrails and parallel power lines. Finally, the landscape expands to reveal distant mountains on the horizon as the road stretches forward through the sparse desert environment.
